purpose: Normalize the original Hanwha PoC source package into the same source-to-claim harness used for Samsung, SK, Hyundai Motor, and LG. The current runtime-promoted Hanwha claims remain issuer-scoped to Hanwha Corporation; affiliate material must enter through company-scoped intake before promotion.

sourcePackages.name: company identity and market identifiers
sourcePackages.hanwhaUse: Confirm DART/KRX/IR routing and aliases for each Hanwha affiliate before affiliate claim promotion.

sourcePackages.name: financial disclosure baseline
sourcePackages.hanwhaUse: Use OpenDART annual financial-statement records as the canonical financial baseline.

sourcePackages.name: earnings and investor presentation baseline
sourcePackages.hanwhaUse: Support affiliate-specific business and segment narratives only when public source provenance and evidence locators exist. Use document-level URLs when available; otherwise use the official IR source page with document title, period, checksum, and extraction hash.

sourcePackages.name: shareholder value and capital action baseline
sourcePackages.hanwhaUse: Keep value-up, split, dividend, buyback, and capital-allocation claims source-backed and dated.

sourcePackages.name: governance and disclosure baseline
sourcePackages.hanwhaUse: Use issuer governance sources for disclosure-control and board-process questions.

acceptanceChecklist: Each runtime companyId is group-prefixed except the holding issuer companyId `hanwha`.
Each local source entry has companyId and companyScope.
Each claim promoted beyond ㈜한화 has an affiliate-specific companyId.
Each source has public source provenance: a document-level URL, DART receipt URL, official IR source-page pointer with local checksum, or explicit claim-driven defer reason.
Analyst reports remain metadata-only unless licensing and quotation rights are separately cleared.
Financial-company revenue or business scale is never redefined manually; use only explicit DART account labels.
runtimePolicy: Current Hanwha runtime claims are issuer-scoped. Affiliate materials are review evidence until promoted into source-backed claims with companyId, companyScope, evidence locator, rights-safe source metadata, and forward-looking labels where needed.
